description: Non-live example scaffold for mainland European Union manufacturer direct availability targets. These targets are placeholders only and are not validated.
notes: EU means mainland European Union fulfilment.
Initial market focus may include Portugal, Spain, and France as submarkets or metadata.
Do not create PT, ES, or FR as primary RegionCode values yet.
UK is excluded and must use RegionCode UK.
Do not run this file as production configuration.
